title: crepis papposissima
intro: Crepis papposissima, also known as Woolly Hawksbeard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family Asteraceae. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reduce swelling, and promote wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Crepis papposissima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
